ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of facility (e.g., outdoor, indoor, tennis, basketball) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the facility */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from other facilities */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of users that can use the facility at a time */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time when the facility opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time when the facility closes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility (e.g., open, closed, maintenance) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "is_indoor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is indoor */,
  "is_outdoor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is outdoor */,
  "recommended_usage" TEXT /* Recommended usage type (e.g., recreational, professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, maintenance staff, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the facility */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., recreational, maintenance) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the usage */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_usage_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is anonymous */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_ins" (
  "check_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check-in event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being checked into */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user checking in */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date when the user checked in */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the user checked in */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Time when the user checked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being posted about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user posting */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the amenity (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the amenity was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_amenities_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_accessibility" (
  "accessibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility feature */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility offering the accessibility feature */,
  "accessibility_feature" TEXT /* Name of the accessibility feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accessibility feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the accessibility feature (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the accessibility feature was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_accessibility_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., cleaning, repairs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_maintenance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed) */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities_users" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "user_id")
)
